title: Agent Skills Standard and SKILL.md Anatomy · Scenario Checkpoint
summary: Create a minimal standards-conforming skill for a repeated review workflow. Every item uses a fresh case and misconception-specific distractors. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for a valid focused agent skill. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create the required SKILL.md and optional scripts, references, and assets with valid names.
Write valid name and description metadata within specification constraints.
Write imperative workflow steps, boundaries, inputs, outputs, and verification criteria.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process

steps.title: Defend one difficult decision

steps.why: Retrieving Portable Contract through the concrete a valid focused agent skill case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Keep skill logic portable while documenting host-specific integrations separately.
